facebook.caption: This place fixes burnout. Private beach. Outdoor pools. A beach bar that catches the last light of the day. Cassia Cottage Resort & Spa Phu Quoc sits on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and delivers exactly what you came to Phu Quoc for. 4.6 stars across 1,386 reviews. That kind of consistency doesn't happen by accident. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
